raw_text: name: césar martínez argote date and place of birth: 11% may 1986, madrid (spain) address: c/ alcatraz 2, 12a, 28019 madrid (spain) nationality: spanish e-mail: cmargote gmail.com telephone number: +34 626 126 621 academic background: september 2004 august 2010 escuela técnica superior de ingenieros aeronáuticos (upm, madrid) aeronautical engineering master thesis accomplished at university of glasgow (february august 2010). mission analysis and flight dynamics on esmo satellite, current esa project. awarded as best group project at the 61* international astronautical congress (prague). september 1992 june 2004 nuestra seora del pilar school (madrid) scientific technological high school (final mark: 9,8 with honors) awarded a scholarship by regional education ministry of madrid during academic year 2004-2005 as excellent academic progress student. languages skills: (from 1 to 5, where 5 is the higher grade) english e certificates: first certificate in english (fce): grade b (june 2002). e courses: attended several cae level english courses during last years. e abroad stays: 6 months stay in glasgow carrying out the master thesis (erasmus exchange), and 2 weeks stays attending technological courses in warsaw and riga. work experience: einternship at renewable energies company (esdras, madrid) accomplishing cad and structural analysis works with catia and ansys. (october-december 2009). e maths and physics private lessons taught during last five years. computing skills: eknowledge of matlab and catia v5. eknowledge of solid edge, microstation and ansys. e knowledge of excel and office tools, and latex. eknowledge of computer programming (fortran). ewindows, linux and internet user. additional training: e management accounting (madrid, cepade, october 2007february 2008). estock exchange and financial markets (madrid, uned, july 2008). e composites processing (getafe, foindesa, july 2008). e wind turbines (madrid, upm, februarymay 2008). ephotography and multimedia technology course (warsaw, best, february 2009). e data transmission processes and technology course (riga, best, july 2009). other skills: e teamwork skills. e capacity for analysis and problem solving skills. e initiative and motivation skills. e efficiency and responsibility. other information: e driving license. e availability to travel. e individual and collective sports usual practice.
